blockingIssues.description: post_swap() sets draining=true before drain sleep but does not reliably clear it on pre-replacement failure paths (e.g., create_backend error), which can leave post_chat permanently returning 503.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit contract-testing guidance for swap failure paths to assert drain flag cleanup when swap errors before backend replacement.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-daemon-backend-safety review found that drain mode is enabled but not always cleared on error paths, and current mission guidance/contracts emphasize success paths more than failure cleanup assertions.
